keywords.serpWeakness: Top results are outdated game-specific wikis and forum threads; no modern cross-game database exists.
userComplaints: Data is often outdated after game updates

keywords.serpWeakness: Most results are text-heavy blog lists, lacking structured sortable tables.
Top sites are niche-specific (e.g., PoE DB, Warframe) with no unified cross-title source.
SERP dominated by old listicles with affiliate links; no interactive comparator.
userComplaints: Biased towards sites that pay for promotion

keywords.serpWeakness: Very few results, mostly deprecated APIs or project pages; no affordable, well-documented API.
userComplaints: No free tier beyond basic access

keywords.serpWeakness: Dominant sites like Maxroll are desktop-optimized and heavy, poor mobile UX.
userComplaints: Too many ads and slow loading

keywords.serpWeakness: poedb.tw is functional but dated UI, slow, and very text-heavy.
Light.gg is dominant but poorly optimized for mobile; lacks advanced filtering.
Wiki pages are fragmented; no single comprehensive table with visual icons and farm locations.
Wowhead dominates but is ad-saturated and slow; requires login for some features.
Information scattered across subreddits and wikis; no central, verified database with history.
No dedicated cross-MMORPG database; results are listicles or forum threads.

topUserComplaints: Existing databases are overloaded with ads and painfully slow, especially on mobile devices.
Loot data is frequently outdated after game patches and expansions, with no reliable update mechanism.
Lack of advanced filtering, search, and comparison tools across items and drop locations.
Missing personal tracking features like wishlists, owned item checklists, or build-specific recommendations.
No unified cross-game loot platform; players must juggle multiple ad-heavy wikis and tools.
recommendedAngles: Build a blazing-fast, mobile-first loot database that covers multiple popular games, with a community-driven verification system to keep drop rates current.
Launch a 'personal loot tracker' app that integrates with character builds and optimizes farming routes to reduce grind time.
Offer a clean, developer-friendly REST API with a generous free tier, enabling third-party tools and community projects to access structured loot data.
